title: aspidium tenerum
intro: Aspidium tenerum, also known as the Tenerum fern or Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Aspidium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aspidium tenerum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Aspidium tenerum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of a paste or cream.
